subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Turn thou with the ear of thy heart unto that which the Tongue of Power proclaimeth amidst all created things in this Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی توجه باذن القلب الی ما یتکلم به لسان القدره بین البریه السجن لمظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
